title: Stainless Steel Colander 22cm, Herogo Metal Kitchen Colanders with Handle, Micro-Perforated Strainer for Clean and Drain Vegetable/Fruit/Pasta/Rice, 3 Quart, Easy use & Dishwasher Safe
features: 【Colander Stainless Steel】Herogo metal colanders and strainers size is 22cm x 9cm, 3 Quart capacity great for draining, straining and cleaning vegetables, pasta, rice, potatoes, fruit and more, One size can meet your all needs in the kitchen

【Micro-Perforations Design】Small and closely spaced holes covered all around of colanders which allow to drain perfectly and enough to clean rice, pasta or other small food, Smooth surface without any rough spots

【High Quality Material】Metal colander made of high quality stainless steel, Food grade metal strainer are safety and healthy for daily use, Premium steel won’t rust, break or bend, Sturdy and durable for long-time use

【Double Handles】Two handles are firmly connected to the colander and provide a good grip to hold when rinsing vegetables, Convenient to hang on kitchen hold rack which can save space and keep kitchen tidy

【Bottom Base】Feet bottom base design can keep stability and don’t worry about colanders tough the bottom of the sink, As a good helper for your daily cooking at home and restaurants, Easy to clean and dry well before storing after washing
description: Product Description Do you looking for a stainless steel colander to replace of traditional patterned one? Do you want a metal colander with handle so you can use in the kitchen? If a versatile colander with draining holes all around so it can drain better, do you like it? HEROGO STAINLESS STEEL COLANDER CAN MEET YOUR ALL NEEDS High quality stainless steel which is sturdy and durable for long time use. Micro-Perforation holes design great for better drain quickly. Good base on the bottom so make it very stable when you use. 22cm perfect size for most purpose in the kitchen and can stacked to save space. Stainless Steel Colander High quality strainers Made of high quality stainless steel and it won’t rust, break or bend, Sturdy and durable for long-time use. Micro-Perforated design all around the colander. Handle & Base Two handle firmly welded on both side Bottom base design, keep it stable and prevent water accumulation Multi-Purpose Cleaning /straining /draining /straining vegetable /fruit /pasta /rice. 22cm Colander 22x9 cm (3 Quart) Draining Pasta Rinsing Vegetables Fruit Container
